snippet.title: NHL 27 Official Reveal Trailer
snippet.description:
Every team has an edge in NHL 27. Pre-order* NHL 27 to play 7 Days Early on September 4th!  
https://x.ea.com/90123

EA SPORTS™ NHL® 27 brings every NHL team's identity to life on the ice, in the arena, and through the broadcast.

Experience Authentic Atmospheres across all 32 NHL arenas with real-world goal songs, new broadcast package and updated crowds.

A refreshed broadcast package featuring John Buccigross and Darren Pang delivers new commentary, modern graphics, updated visuals, and richer storytelling for a more authentic NHL presentation.

Connected Franchise lets you create and run your own online league with up to 32 human-controlled teams, complete with customizable rules, flexible scheduling, roster management, and powerful commissioner tools.

On the ice, 32 unique Team Playbooks powered by NHL EDGE data bring authentic team identities to life. From breakouts to special teams and late-game strategy, every matchup feels more distinct, making every shift matter.

Conditions & restrictions apply. See https://www.ea.com/games/nhl/nhl-27/game-disclaimers for details.

#nhl27 #nhl27reveal

snippet.title: Kyle Gordon - Mr. Jambo (feat. Barry Bergen) [Official Music Video]
snippet.description:
Pre-save 'Kyle Gordon Is Everywhere': https://kylegordon.lnk.to/KyleGordonIsEverywhereID
"Mr. Jambo" out 7/17: https://kylegordon.lnk.to/MrJamboID

Lyrics:

Hey there Mr. Jambo
Out there in the African Sun
Do you ever get tired

Hey there Mr. Jambo
Will you share with me the
Jambalaya
Living in your soul

And then he told me

Angikhulumi isingisi (I don’t speak English)
Unaye umhumushi? (Do you have a translator)
Yeka ukuklabalasa (Stop yelling)

Well I couldn’t speak his language
I couldn’t even understand a word
But I knew the meaning was what I
I decided I had heard

He said
The love you seek
It’s in the valley
Of the soul

The love you seek
It’s in the wisdom
Written
On the ancient scrolls

Hey there Mr. Jambo
Out there with the lions and bears
Do you ever get scared

Hey there Mr. Jambo
Can the Serengeti
Swallow up the evils of our world

And then he whispered

Angikhulumi isingisi (I don’t speak English)
Unaye umhumushi? (Do you have a translator)
Yeka ukuklabalasa (Stop yelling)

Still couldn’t speak his language
I couldn’t even understand a word
But I knew the meaning was what I decided I had heard

He said
The love you seek
It’s in the valley
Of the soul

The love you seek
It’s in the wisdom
Written
On the ancient scrolls

The African Wisdom

Everybody say hey

In the valley
Written on the ancient scrolls

snippet.description:
DOMINION (2027) is a fan-made prehistoric sci-fi thriller that imagines an ancient predator awakening beneath the frozen wilderness of Antarctica. Starring Tom Cruise, this Foxstar Media concept delivers breathtaking action, colossal dinosaurs, and an intense fight for survival against a creature thought to be extinct forever.

🎥 Movie Concept Summary
While tracking a mysterious signal beneath Antarctica's frozen landscape, two explorers accidentally fall into a hidden underground ice cavern and discover an enormous dinosaur perfectly preserved inside a colossal wall of ancient ice. The discovery quickly becomes the greatest scientific breakthrough in human history.

Tom Cruise stars as Dr. Ethan Walker, the leader of an elite international research mission sent to recover the prehistoric giant. The creature is carefully extracted from the cavern and transported to a massive Antarctic laboratory, where scientists begin melting the ice in hopes of unlocking secrets from Earth's distant past.

As the thawing process continues, unexplained tremors shake the facility and strange signs reveal that the impossible may be true—the dinosaur is still alive. Seconds later, thunderous footsteps echo across the ice, a rescue helicopter erupts into a massive explosion, and the entire research camp descends into chaos.

Tom awakens in the snow, slowly turns around... and comes face to face with the colossal predator. With a deafening roar, the ancient beast breaks free, beginning a desperate battle for survival in the frozen wilderness.

Some legends never went extinct... they were waiting beneath the ice.

snippet.title: Popeye: The Sailor Man (2026) | Mark Wahlberg, Matt Damon, Emily Blunt | Concept Trailer
snippet.description:
#popeye  #markwahlberg #concepttrailer 

Watch This Popeye The Sailor Man Concept Trailer

What if Popeye was reimagined as a gritty, rain-soaked crime thriller where a retired Navy sailor turned bare-knuckle dock fighter is dragged back into a war with the brother he left behind to build an empire on fear? This fan-made concept trailer imagines Popeye The Sailor Man for 2026 where Mark Wahlberg stars as Popeye, a decorated serviceman who walked away from his past and buried it beneath bruised knuckles and cheap whiskey, grinding through anonymous nights as a longshoreman and underground fighter on the docks of a corrupt port city he never wanted to call home.

I personally created every storyboard and visual in this "What If" concept from scratch, building a dark and grounded reimagining where Matt Damon plays Bluto, the man Popeye left behind, a ruthless ex-Navy commander who seized control of the entire port and built a criminal empire on smuggling, underground fighting, and intimidation, ruling from his warehouse throne with an iron grip that nobody dares challenge.

Emily Blunt plays Olive Oyl, a fearless investigative journalist who has spent nearly a year secretly building a case against Bluto's operation and tracks down Popeye as the one living witness to the military crimes that started it all, dragging him back into a world he swore he had escaped forever.

When Bluto retaliates by capturing Olive, Popeye is forced to tear through his former brother's empire dock by dock and fight by fight, carving a path across the rain-soaked waterfront all the way to the cargo ships anchored in the harbour where the evidence of the smuggling operation lies hidden below deck.

Every visual in this HD concept trailer was designed and built by me to reimagine one of the most iconic characters in pop culture history as a brutal waterfront crime story where the hero fights not with superpowers but with fists, loyalty, and one last canister of a military-grade seaweed combat stimulant he swore he would never touch again.

This Popeye concept trailer builds to a final reckoning between two men who once called each other brother, while the woman who started the investigation secures the evidence that will bring the empire crashing down, proving that the sailor man was never a cartoon but a fighter who needed one last reason to stop running from the man he used to be.

Disclaimer: This is entirely a fan-made concept trailer created for entertainment and creative purposes only. All storyboard work and visuals were originally created by me. This video is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or connected to Paramount Pictures, King Features Syndicate, or any official Popeye production or its rights holders.

Along with fan-made trailers, I also share movie reviews, news, and updates from the world of entertainment. Be sure to hit that subscribe button and stay updated on all the latest from my channel!

#popeye  #markwahlberg #concepttrailer 

Watch This Popeye The Sailor Man Concept Trailer

What if Popeye was reimagined as a gritty, rain-soaked crime thriller where a retired Navy sailor turned bare-knuckle dock fighter is dragged back into a war with the brother he left behind to build an empire on fear? This fan-made concept trailer imagines Popeye The Sailor Man for 2026 where Mark Wahlberg stars as Popeye, a decorated serviceman who walked away from his past and buried it beneath bruised knuckles and cheap whiskey, grinding through anonymous nights as a longshoreman and underground fighter on the docks of a corrupt port city he never wanted to call home.

I personally created every storyboard and visual in this "What If" concept from scratch, building a dark and grounded reimagining where Matt Damon plays Bluto, the man Popeye left behind, a ruthless ex-Navy commander who seized control of the entire port and built a criminal empire on smuggling, underground fighting, and intimidation, ruling from his warehouse throne with an iron grip that nobody dares challenge.

Emily Blunt plays Olive Oyl, a fearless investigative journalist who has spent nearly a year secretly building a case against Bluto's operation and tracks down Popeye as the one living witness to the military crimes that started it all, dragging him back into a world he swore he had escaped forever.

When Bluto retaliates by capturing Olive, Popeye is forced to tear through his former brother's empire dock by dock and fight by fight, carving a path across the rain-soaked waterfront all the way to the cargo ships anchored in the harbour where the evidence of the smuggling operation lies hidden below deck.

Every visual in this HD concept trailer was designed and built by me to reimagine one of the most iconic characters in pop culture history as a brutal waterfront crime story where the hero fights not with superpowers but with fists, loyalty, and one last canister of a military-grade seaweed combat stimulant he swore he would never touch again.

This Popeye concept trailer builds to a final reckoning between two men who once called each other brother, while the woman who started the investigation secures the evidence that will bring the empire crashing down, proving that the sailor man was never a cartoon but a fighter who needed one last reason to stop running from the man he used to be.

Disclaimer: This is entirely a fan-made concept trailer created for entertainment and creative purposes only. All storyboard work and visuals were originally created by me. This video is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or connected to Paramount Pictures, King Features Syndicate, or any official Popeye production or its rights holders.

Along with fan-made trailers, I also share movie reviews, news, and updates from the world of entertainment. Be sure to hit that subscribe button and stay updated on all the latest from my channel!

Kaka Ji Records presents new song "Guess Who?" from the album IMMORTAL

Song :- Guess Who?
Lyricist/Composer/Singer:- #kakaji 
Mix/Master:- Stereo Shinobi
Video - Witness Films
Video Director:- Divyanshu Joshi (DJ)
Ai Generalist:- Icyigniter CGI aka Azhar Khan

ਜਿਹੜੀ ਸਦੀਆਂ 'ਚ ਗਈ ਨੀ ਸੁਧਾਰੀ, 
ਚੜ੍ਹੀ ਸਾਰਿਆਂ 'ਤੇ ਰੱਬ ਦੀ ਖੁਮਾਰੀ, 
ਬਾਬੇ ਸਾਰਿਆਂ ਦੇ ਹੀ ਬਲਾਤਕਾਰੀ.

ਲੋਕ ਫੁਕਰੇ ਤੇ ਹੌਲ਼ੇ ਕਿਰਦਾਰ ਦੇ, 
ਇਤਿਹਾਸ ਲੈ ਕੇ ਹਵਾਬਾਜ਼ੀ ਮਾਰਦੇ, 
ਕੁਝ ਜਿੱਤਦੇ, ਤੇ ਚਾਹੇ ਜਿਹੜੇ ਹਾਰਦੇ, 
ਇਹਨਾਂ ਵਿੱਚੋਂ ਹੀ ਆਉਂਦੇ ਨੇ ਅਧਿਕਾਰੀ ਸਰਕਾਰੀ.

ਜਿਹੜੀ ਸਦੀਆਂ 'ਚ ਗਈ ਨੀ ਸੁਧਾਰੀ, 
ਚੜ੍ਹੀ ਸਾਰਿਆਂ 'ਤੇ ਰੱਬ ਦੀ ਖੁਮਾਰੀ, 
ਬਾਬੇ ਸਾਰਿਆਂ ਦੇ ਹੀ ਬਲਾਤਕਾਰੀ.

ਇਹ ਤਾਂ ਕਿਸੇ ਨੂੰ ਵੀ ਨਹੀਂ ਪਸੰਦ ਆ ਰਹੇ, ਹੁਣ ਦੂਜੇ ਮੁਲਕਾਂ 'ਚ ਗੰਦ ਪਾ ਰਹੇ, ਇਕ ਦੂਜੇ ਕੋਲੋਂ ਐਵੇਂ ਖਾਰ ਖਾ ਰਹੇ, ਸ਼ਾਂਤ ਠਾਵਾਂ 'ਤੇ ਫਜ਼ੂਲ ਨਾਰੇ ਲਾ ਰਹੇ. ਹੁਣ ਗਾਨ ਜਿਹੜੇ ਇਹਨਾਂ ਦਾ ਹੀ ਘਰ ਹੈ, ਬੜੇ ਚਾਪਲੂਸ ਇਹਨਾਂ ਦੇ ਲਿਖਾਰੀ, ਵਪਾਰੀ.

ਜਿਹੜੀ ਸਦੀਆਂ 'ਚ ਗਈ ਨੀ ਸੁਧਾਰੀ, 
ਚੜ੍ਹੀ ਸਾਰਿਆਂ 'ਤੇ ਰੱਬ ਦੀ ਖੁਮਾਰੀ, 
ਬਾਬੇ ਸਾਰਿਆਂ ਦੇ ਹੀ ਬਲਾਤਕਾਰੀ.

ਹੁਣ ਦੂਜੇ ਮੁਲਕਾਂ 'ਚ ਗੰਦ ਪਾ ਰਹੇ, 
ਇਕ ਦੂਜੇ ਕੋਲੋਂ ਐਵੇਂ ਖਾਰ ਖਾ ਰਹੇ, 
ਸ਼ਾਂਤ ਥਾਵਾਂ 'ਤੇ ਫਜ਼ੂਲ ਨਾਅਰੇ ਲਾ ਰਹੇ,
ਗੁਣਗਾਨ ਜਿਹੜੇ ਇਹਨਾਂ ਦਾ ਹੀ ਗਾ ਰਹੇ, 
ਬੜੇ ਚਾਪਲੂਸ ਇਹਨਾਂ ਦੇ ਲਿਖਾਰੀ, ਵਪਾਰੀ.

ਇਸ ਮੁਲਕ 'ਚ ਵਹਿਮ ਦੀ ਬਿਮਾਰੀ, 
ਜਿਹੜੀ ਸਦੀਆਂ 'ਚ ਗਈ ਨੀ ਸੁਧਾਰੀ, 
ਚੜ੍ਹੀ ਸਾਰਿਆਂ 'ਤੇ ਰੱਬ ਦੀ ਖੁਮਾਰੀ, 
ਬਾਬੇ ਸਾਰਿਆਂ ਦੇ ਹੀ ਬਲਾਤਕਾਰੀ.

ਜੀਹਨੂੰ ਪੂਜਦੇ ਉਹਦਾ ਜਲੂਸ ਕੱਢਦੇ, 
ਕਿਸੇ ਟਾਈਪ ਦਾ ਵੀ ਰੱਬ ਨੀ ਇਹ ਛੱਡਦੇ, 
ਉੱਥੇ ਉੱਥੇ ਜਾ ਕੇ ਬਦਬੂ ਜੀ ਆਉਂਦੀ ਹੈ, 
ਜਿੱਥੇ ਜਿੱਥੇ ਜਾ ਕੇ ਇਹ ਝੰਡੇ ਗੱਡਦੇ
ਮੱਤ ਕੁਦਰਤ ਦੀ ਇਹਨਾ ਨੇ ਮਾਰੀ,
ਜਿੰਨੇ ਫੁੱਦੂ ਇਹ ਓਨੇ ਹੀ ਹੰਕਾਰੀ,
ਇਹ ਧਰਤੀ ਦੀ ਬਣ ਗਏ ਬਿਮਾਰੀ,
ਜਿਹੜੀ ਸਦੀਆਂ ’ਚ ਜਾਣੀ ਨੀ ਸੁਧਾਰੀ।

ਇਸ ਮੁਲਕ 'ਚ ਵਹਿਮ ਦੀ ਬਿਮਾਰੀ, 
ਜਿਹੜੀ ਸਦੀਆਂ 'ਚ ਗਈ ਨੀ ਸੁਧਾਰੀ, 
ਚੜ੍ਹੀ ਸਾਰਿਆਂ 'ਤੇ ਰੱਬ ਦੀ ਖੁਮਾਰੀ, 
ਬਾਬੇ ਸਾਰਿਆਂ ਦੇ ਹੀ ਬਲਾਤਕਾਰੀ.

ਜਿੱਥੇ ਭੇਜਦੇ ਨੇ ਕੁੜੀਆਂ ਨੂੰ ਮੱਥਾ ਟੇਕਣੇ ਨੂੰ 
ਉੱਥੇ ਅੱਖਾਂ ਨਾਲ ਪਾੜਦੇ ਨੇ ਕੱਪੜੇ
ਇਹਨਾਂ ਦਾ ਇਲਾਜ ਨਹੀਂ ਕੋਈ ਕਰ ਸਕਦਾ, 
ਚਾਹੇ ਡੇਢ ਸੌ ਵਾਰੀ ਵੀ ਓਸ਼ੋ ਅੱਪੜੇ 
ਟੈਕਸ ਦਾ ਕੀ ਕੀਤਾ ਤੁਹਾਡੇ ਫੇਵਰਟ ਨੇ, 
ਪੁੱਛੋ ਉਹਨੂੰ ਛੱਡ ਕੇ ਇਹ ਬੰਦਗੀ 
ਸਾਰੀ ਦੁਨੀਆਂ ਤੋਂ ਵੱਧ ਤੁਹਾਡੇ ਕੋਲ ਕਿਉਂ, 
ਹਵਾ, ਪਾਣੀ, ਮਿੱਟੀ, ਸੋਚ ਵਿੱਚ ਗੰਦਗੀ. 
ਤੁਹਾਡੀ ਗੰਦਗੀ 'ਚ ਫਸ ਗਏ ਨੇ ਜਨੌਰ
“ਕਾਕੇ” ਪੰਛੀ ਮਾਰ ਗਏ ਨੇ ਉਡਾਰੀ, 
ਧਰਮਾਂ ਦਾ ਮਸਲਾ ਜੇ ਹੱਲ ਹੋ ਵੀ ਗਿਆ 
ਜੰਗ ਜਾਤਾਂ ਵਾਲ਼ੀ ਰੱਖਣਗੇ ਜਾਰੀ 

ਇਸ ਮੁਲਕ 'ਚ ਵਹਿਮ ਦੀ ਬਿਮਾਰੀ, 
ਜਿਹੜੀ ਸਦੀਆਂ 'ਚ ਗਈ ਨੀ ਸੁਧਾਰੀ, 
ਚੜ੍ਹੀ ਸਾਰਿਆਂ 'ਤੇ ਰੱਬ ਦੀ ਖੁਮਾਰੀ, 
ਬਾਬੇ ਸਾਰਿਆਂ ਦੇ ਹੀ ਬਲਾਤਕਾਰੀ.

There’s an epidemic of delusion in this country,
A disease that hasn’t been cured for centuries.
Everyone is intoxicated with the name of God,
And they all have some self-proclaimed holy men who turn out as rapists.

People are egoistic, with weak character.
They boast by clinging to history.
Some win, and some may lose,
Yet from among them come the government officials.

There’s an epidemic of delusion in this country,
A disease that hasn’t been cured for centuries.
Everyone is intoxicated with the name of God,

And they all have some self-proclaimed holy men who turn out as rapists.

Nobody really likes them anymore.
Now they’re spreading filth in other countries.
They keep holding grudges against one another,
Shouting pointless slogans in places that were once peaceful.
Those who keep singing their praises—
Their writers are nothing but sycophants bussinessmen.

There’s an epidemic of delusion in this country,
A disease that hasn’t been cured for centuries.
Everyone is intoxicated with the name of God,

And they all have some self-proclaimed holy men who turn out as rapists.

They just ruin Whatever they worship
They just start worshiping anything ,

If they get in power in anywhere
You will see and smell a lot garbage there.
They have polluted the nature,
The more foolish they are,

the more proud they are of themselves.
They’ve become a disease upon this earth,
Disease that will remain uncured for centuries.

There’s an epidemic of delusion in this country,
A disease that hasn’t been cured for centuries.
Everyone is intoxicated with the name of God,

And they all have some self-proclaimed holy men who turn out as rapists.

They send daughters to bow their heads in worship,
Yet there they strip them with their eyes.
No one can cure these people,
Even if Osho himself returned a hundred and fifty times.
What did your favorite leader do with your taxes?
Ask him instead of offering blind devotion.
Why is there, more than anywhere else in the world,
So much pollution in your air, your water, your soil, and even your thinking?
Your corruption has trapped the innocent animals,
“Kaka,” the birds have flown to other countries.
Even if the issue of religion were somehow resolved,
They would keep the war over caste alive.

There’s an epidemic of delusion in this country,
A disease that hasn’t been cured for centuries.
Everyone is intoxicated with the name of God,
And they all have some self-proclaimed holy men who turn out as rapist

snippet.title: Filipinana - Official Trailer
snippet.description: Isabel, a 17-year-old from the rural north of the Philippines, works at a posh country club outside Manila. Amid stifling heat and pervasive drought, she lines up golf balls for powerful men to drive into the carefully manicured verdant horizon. Between shifts, she wanders the immaculate grounds, sampling its luxuries and exploring its liminal spaces. The club’s members, including an industrialist and his expatriate niece, the president and his pampered wife, and a slew of Chinese tourists, engage in a complex dance with the doting and subservient staff. But something is rotting beneath the pristine fairways of the elite resort, as Isabel discovers when she tries to return a mislaid golf club to its patriarchal director, Dr. Palanca. The deeper she journeys into its most exclusive corners, the closer she gets to the violent truths of the club, her native Philippines, and her own past. Executive produced by Jia Zhangke, this Sundance award-winning debut announces writer-director Rafael Manuel as a major new voice in international cinema.
